name: New Meridian Simulated Response Test Suite Extract
population_or_context: New Meridian operational test forms and item bank assets used by states interested in comparability claims; scoring-process guidance covers machine-scored ELA/literacy and mathematics items.
sample_size: Not applicable; process guidance does not report a response count.
methods: Extracted the Machine Scoring subsection. The source defines a test suite as test cases used to validate scoring and scanning rules and procedures for machine-scored items, then states that bank assets should include simulated responses across content areas and mathematics language versions.
education_context: State summative operational test forms using New Meridian ELA/literacy and mathematics item bank content, including machine-scored items with scoring and scanning rules.
response_origin: Simulated responses to items used as machine-scoring test cases; not real student responses and not LLM-generated responses.
rubric_label_space: Expected scoring-rule and scanning-rule outcomes for machine-scored items, including complex scoring rules, unusual response patterns, gridded mathematics variations, and partially completed or erased responses.
label_source: Expected outcomes are derived from item scoring and scanning rules rather than independent human scoring.
generation_model: Not applicable; no LLM or response generator is reported.
generation_method: Construct simulated response test cases that cover relevant content areas, language versions, complex rules, unusual response patterns, gridded-response variations, and incomplete or erased responses.
evaluation_method: Operational test-suite review verifies that scoring rules, scanning rules, and procedures for machine-scored items are applied correctly; no statistical evaluation metric is reported for the simulated cases.
scorer_use: Simulated responses are used for rule-based machine-scoring and scanning quality assurance, not for training an automated essay scorer or validating an LLM scorer.
real_response_comparator: No real-response comparator is reported for the simulated test-suite cases.
reported_metrics: No quantitative metrics are reported for the simulated-response test suite.
limitations: The source supports simulated-response test suites for machine-scoring and scanning-rule QA, not LLM-generated training augmentation.
The source does not describe automated essay scoring model training, subgroup fairness validation, or final deployment validation from simulated responses.
The guidance does not report response counts, generation procedures, or empirical performance metrics for the simulated test cases.
